name: Nissan Australia
message: We've obtained 100  GB of Nissan Australia. They seem not to be very interested in the data, so we will upload it for you within afew days. You will find docs with personal information of their employees in the archives and much other interested stuff like NDAs, projects, information about clients and partners etc. By the way, there is a notice on their website regarding investigation about possible personal information leakage, so we will confirm that with the data uploading.
